name: MaintenanceDeluxe
overview: Premium maintenance overlay for Jellyfin with live countdown and rich release notes.
description: Display a premium, calm, cinema-themed maintenance overlay to your Jellyfin users. Features a live countdown, a time-based progress bar, admin-configurable release notes sections (with icons, titles, and markdown), and a TV-friendly design with graceful degradation on low-end devices. Forked from JellyFlare (GPL-3.0).
